---
title: "Greifensee in Spring"
subtitle: "Uster · May 2026"
categories:
  - Birds
  - Nature
  - Greifensee
  - Architecture
date: "2026-05-01"
image: "images/lantern.JPG"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    lightbox: true
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}

![](images/lantern.JPG){group="greifensee"}

![](images/gasse.JPG){group="greifensee"}

![](images/sunset.JPG){group="greifensee"}

![](images/schwan.JPG){group="greifensee"}

![](images/gemeinde.JPG){group="greifensee"}

![](images/blässhuhn.JPG){group="greifensee"}

![](images/towers.JPG){group="greifensee"}

![](images/skyline.JPG){group="greifensee"}

![](images/drachen.JPG){group="greifensee"}

:::
